text_block_list.text: C'mon, c'mon, c'mon, c'mon!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that voice?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Jordan! I'm glad you're not a ghost. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Curren?! Like, the real-life Curren Chan?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No waaay! This place must be seriously lucky!
Hey, let's take a selfie!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah, s-sure...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, cheeeeese! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Now this pic is FIRE! "#PowerSpot #BestPic
#DreamsComeTrue #Beauty #SuperCute."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, sorry for taking up your time. Later! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa. That really caught me off guard.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But she looked really happy that she got her
"#BestPic." ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, go me! ♪ I made her wish come true!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If one thing's for certain, it's that Tosen Jordan's
wish wouldn't have come true if it hadn't been for
Curren Chan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you could say... it's all thanks to Curren
Chan.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Hey, Big Bro. What would you wish for?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Hey, Big Sis. What would you wish for?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Not only are you at a lucky spot—you're next to
meee... I bet any of your wishes could come true!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If it were me, I'd wish to stay with you even
longer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If it were me, I'd wish to stay with you even
longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz, buzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My phone suddenly starts ringing, so I answer.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
"Oh! You picked up! Sorry for calling you out of
the blue, but the academy's been flooded with
reporters..."

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
"They're saying they want to interview you and
Curren Chan. Is it okay if I accept their offer?"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Did my wish just come true? Ehehe. Maybe it's
because...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm so cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan seems to be in a grand mood as we
spend a little more time together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The power of cuteness is amazing...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
"Oh! You picked up! Sorry for calling you out of
the blue, but Director Akikawa said she wanted
to speak with you..."

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
"Is there any way you could come back to the
academy right away?"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Boo... I didn't ask for the opposite to happen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Awww, that's too bad. Maybe I'm not so lucky
after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan gazes up at the sky with a
melancholic look on her face.
